overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring neon-lit holographic advertisements, reflective wet surfaces, and modern architecture. The camera moves through a commercial district with prominent signage for 'KENDACHI' and 'Fuyutsuki Electronics', passing futuristic seating areas and NPCs, before ending at an overlook of a busy multi-lane highway below.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza, passing futuristic donut-shaped seating structures

notable_agents.action: person leaning against glass railing, looking at phone
child in white shirt walking ahead

entered.detail: tall commercial building with large illuminated 'KENDACHI' signage in white and pink neon
large circular futuristic seating structures with textured gold and purple surfaces
futuristic white canopy structure with purple neon lighting underneath
massive holographic billboard displaying '3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE' with red and pink imagery
transparent glass barrier with metallic posts along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements. The camera moves forward past distinctive donut-shaped seating structures while the KENDACHI building looms on the right. The wet reflective tiles mirror the purple and cyan neon lights overhead, and a few pedestrians are scattered throughout the open space.

events.description: moving under overhead structure reduces direct neon exposure, creating more shadowed environment

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a red vending machine and approaching a stairway area

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing standing near the red vending machine

entered.detail: tall red automated terminal with illuminated screen and yellow hazard stripes at base
wide staircase with dark steps leading upward, flanked by concrete walls
linear cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a more enclosed area of the plaza, passing a prominent red vending machine on the left. The environment becomes semi-covered with overhead neon strips providing illumination. The large billboard remains visible ahead while the seating structures fall behind. A few pedestrians are visible near the stairway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with massive digital billboards

events.description: passing the large 3mouths billboard and entering the Fuyutsuki Electronics plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking past the massive billboard and approaching the Fuyutsuki Electronics building entrance

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench facing the billboard

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent red 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' signage and Japanese text below
low rectangular seating with illuminated edges arranged along the walkway
tall vertical billboard displaying 'Watson Whore' text with figure imagery

segments.scene_description: The camera passes extremely close to the massive '3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE' billboard, which dominates the left side of the frame with its vivid red holographic display. The scene opens into the Fuyutsuki Electronics plaza, with the building's bright red signage visible ahead. Concrete benches line the right side where a few NPCs are seated, and the Watson Whore billboard becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined pedestrian walkway with overhead bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the return path following other pedestrians, passing palm trees and seating areas

notable_agents.action: man in dark suit walking ahead toward the KENDACHI building

entered.detail: tall palm tree in large planter, providing greenery among the neon structures
elevated pedestrian bridge with glass sides connecting buildings across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the opposite side of the plaza, with the Fuyutsuki building now on the left and the KENDACHI building reappearing ahead on the right. Palm trees line the walkway, adding vegetation to the urban environment. An overhead pedestrian walkway spans the plaza ahead, and several NPCs walk in the same direction toward the KENDACHI area.

events.description: reaching the plaza edge and transitioning to overlook view of highway traffic below

agents.ego_description: stopping at the overlook to observe the traffic and cityscape below

entered.detail: elevated viewing area with glass railing overlooking the city highway system
multi-lane road with moving traffic including cars and buses visible below
dense cluster of skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the edge of the plaza and stops at an overlook, revealing a stunning view of a busy multi-lane highway below with moderate traffic flow. The perspective shifts to show the dense cyberpunk cityscape extending into the foggy distance, with countless neon signs and illuminated buildings. The Fuyutsuki building remains visible to the left while the camera pans to take in the urban canyon view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza that eventually opens into a sweeping overlook of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins by gliding past donut-shaped seating and the looming KENDACHI building, where wet tiles mirror vibrant purple and cyan lights. As the camera moves into a semi-covered area past a red vending machine, the space tightens before expanding again as it brushes past a massive red holographic billboard and enters the Fuyutsuki Electronics plaza. The scene then shifts along a palm-lined walkway beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge, moving between the glow of the Fuyutsuki and KENDACHI buildings. Finally, the camera reaches the plaza's edge and stops at an overlook, panning across a busy multi-lane highway and a dense, foggy cityscape of illuminated skyscrapers.
